records.question: Which campuses named San Francisco State University located in San Francisco county have been established since at least 1899 and have discipline 11 enrollments with at least 235 undergraduates and 117 graduates in 2004 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN discipline_enrollments ON campuses.id = discipline_enrollments.campus
WHERE campuses.location = 'San Francisco' AND discipline_enrollments.discipline = 11 AND discipline_enrollments.undergraduate >= 235 AND campuses.year >= 1899 AND campuses.county = 'San Francisco' AND campuses.campus = 'San Francisco State University' AND discipline_enrollments.graduate >= 117 AND discipline_enrollments.year >= 2004
records.pred_sql: select campuses.id from campuses join discipline_enrollments on campuses.id = discipline_enrollments.campus where lower(campuses.campus) like '%san francisco state university%' and lower(campuses.county) like '%san francisco%' and campuses.year >= 1899 and discipline_enrollments.discipline = '11' and discipline_enrollments.year >= 2004 and discipline_enrollments.undergraduate >= 235 and discipline_enrollments.graduate >= 117 limit 5
records.thought: Filter campuses by name, location, and year established, then join with discipline_enrollments to find those with discipline 11 enrollments meeting the undergraduate and graduate thresholds from 2004 onwards.

records.question: Which campuses are located in Stanislaus county and were established in the year 1957 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
WHERE campuses.year <= 1957 AND campuses.county = 'Stanislaus'
records.pred_sql: select campuses.id from campuses where lower(county) like '%stanislaus%' and year <= 1957 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter campuses by county 'stanislaus' and year less than or equal to 1957, then select their ids with a limit of 5.

records.question: Which campuses named California State University-Bakersfield have faculty counts of at least 361.6 in the year 2003 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN faculty ON campuses.id = faculty.campus
WHERE faculty.year >= 2003 AND campuses.campus = 'California State University-Bakersfield' AND faculty.faculty >= 361.6
records.pred_sql: select campuses.id from campuses join faculty on campuses.id = faculty.campus where lower(campuses.campus) like '%california state university-bakersfield%' and faculty.faculty >= 361.6 and faculty.year >= 2003 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter campuses named 'California State University-Bakersfield' and join with faculty to find those with faculty counts >= 361.6 from year 2003 onwards.

records.question: Which campuses established no later than 1887 offer degrees numbering at most 3026?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
WHERE degrees.degrees <= 3026 AND campuses.year <= 1887
records.pred_sql: select campuses.id from campuses join degrees on degrees.campus = campuses.id where campuses.year <= 1887 and degrees.degrees <= 3026 limit 5
records.thought: Filter campuses established in or before 1887 and join with degrees to find those with degrees at most 3026, then select campus ids.

records.question: Which campuses have related csu_fees, degrees, and enrollments records, and have enrollments with a total enrollment in the academic year exactly equal to 704?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE enrollments.totalenrollment_ay = 704
records.pred_sql: select campuses.id from campuses join csu_fees on csu_fees.campus = campuses.id join degrees on degrees.campus = campuses.id join enrollments on enrollments.campus = campuses.id where enrollments.totalenrollment_ay = 704 limit 5;
records.thought: To find campuses with related csu_fees, degrees, and enrollments records and with total enrollment exactly 704, join the campuses table with csu_fees, degrees, and enrollments on campus id, and filter enrollments by total enrollment 704.

records.question: What campuses are located in Los Angeles county that have discipline enrollments?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN discipline_enrollments ON campuses.id = discipline_enrollments.campus
WHERE campuses.county = 'Los Angeles'
records.pred_sql: select campuses.id from campuses join discipline_enrollments on campuses.id = discipline_enrollments.campus where lower(campuses.county) like '%los angeles%' limit 5;
records.thought: To find campuses located in Los Angeles county that have discipline enrollments, join Campuses with discipline_enrollments on Campus ID and filter by county 'los angeles'.

records.question: Which campuses named Humboldt State University have a campus fee exactly 1884 in the year 1996 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
WHERE campuses.campus = 'Humboldt State University' AND csu_fees.campusfee = 1884 AND csu_fees.year >= 1996
records.pred_sql: select campuses.id from campuses join csu_fees on csu_fees.campus = campuses.id where lower(campuses.campus) like '%humboldt state university%' and csu_fees.campusfee = 1884 and csu_fees.year >= 1996 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter campuses named 'Humboldt State University' and join with csu_fees to find those with a campus fee of 1884 in the year 1996 or later.

records.question: Which campuses named California State University-Bakersfield have been established since 1965, have at least 22 disciplines, at most 514 undergraduate enrollments, no more than 0 graduate enrollments, total enrollment of at least 457, and fees data from 1996 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN discipline_enrollments ON campuses.id = discipline_enrollments.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE discipline_enrollments.undergraduate <= 514 AND campuses.year >= 1965 AND discipline_enrollments.graduate <= 0 AND csu_fees.year >= 1996 AND campuses.campus = 'California State University-Bakersfield' AND enrollments.totalenrollment_ay >= 457 AND discipline_enrollments.discipline >= 22
records.pred_sql:
select campuses.id from campuses
join discipline_enrollments on discipline_enrollments.campus = campuses.id
join enrollments on enrollments.campus = campuses.id and enrollments.year = discipline_enrollments.year
join csu_fees on csu_fees.campus = campuses.id and csu_fees.year >= 1996
where lower(campuses.campus) like '%california state university-bakersfield%'
  and campuses.year > 1965
  and discipline_enrollments.undergraduate <= 514
  and discipline_enrollments.graduate <= 0
  and enrollments.totalenrollment_ay >= 457
group by campuses.id
having count(distinct discipline_enrollments.discipline) >= 22
limit 5
records.thought: Filter campuses named 'California State University-Bakersfield' established since 1965, join with discipline_enrollments to count disciplines with constraints on undergraduate and graduate enrollments, join with enrollments for total enrollment, and join with csu_fees for fees data from 1996 or late

records.question: Which campuses named California State University-Fullerton are located in Orange county and were established in 1957 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
WHERE campuses.county = 'Orange' AND campuses.year >= 1957 AND campuses.campus = 'California State University-Fullerton'
records.pred_sql: select campuses.id from campuses where lower(campus) like '%california state university-fullerton%' and lower(county) like '%orange%' and year >= 1957 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter campuses by name containing 'california state university-fullerton', located in orange county, and established in 1957 or later.

records.question: Which campuses named San Francisco State University located in San Francisco have at least 1899 as their year, are in San Francisco county, offer exactly 4098 degrees, and had campus fees of at most 1978 in or before 1996?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
WHERE csu_fees.campusfee <= 1978 AND campuses.county = 'San Francisco' AND csu_fees.year <= 1996 AND campuses.year >= 1899 AND degrees.degrees = 4098 AND campuses.location = 'San Francisco' AND campuses.campus = 'San Francisco State University'
records.pred_sql: select campuses.id from campuses join degrees on degrees.campus = campuses.id join csu_fees on csu_fees.campus = campuses.id where lower(campuses.campus) like '%san francisco state university%' and lower(campuses.location) like '%san francisco%' and campuses.year >= 1899 and lower(campuses.county) like '%san francisco%' and degrees.degrees = 4098 and csu_fees.campusfee <= 1978 and csu_fees.year <= 1996 limit 5
records.thought: Filter campuses by name, location, year, and county, then join with degrees for exact degree count and csu_fees for campus fees with year condition, applying all filters accordingly.
